response.justification: Candidate has strong geospatial/GIS background through GISCollective and Green Map work, plus low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic (DLang, millions of req/sec). However, the role's primary requirement is modern C++ (or Rust), and the candidate's C++ experience is limited to roughly 6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus a bachelor thesis, with no listed Rust experience. Recent work has been predominantly TypeScript/Node.js full-stack. The GIS domain fit is genuine, but the core language requirement is not met at a senior level.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput systems background at Sociomantic
Long senior-level track record with strong testing/craftsmanship discipline
concerns: Minimal and dated modern C++ experience; no Rust experience
No navigation/routing pipeline or map-tiling background
Recent stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not systems-level C++/Linux
